claim: Core store API lives in src/repo_memory/store.py — exports init/add_fact/list_facts/add_decision/add_gotcha/render
CLI entry point is repo_memory.cli:main, MCP server entry point is repo_memory.mcp_server:main (both declared in pyproject.toml [project.scripts])
facts.jsonl format: one JSON object per line, schema {id, ts, claim, evidence, tags, added_by}. Never edit existing lines — append only
MCP server reads REPO_MEMORY_ROOT env var or --repo CLI flag to know which repo's .ai-memory/ to read
Glama public URL pattern is glama.ai/mcp/servers/<github_owner>/<repo_name> — works as soon as Glama indexes the submitted GitHub URL
